text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?! We can't play it? Why not?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I pass by the arcade one day, I hear someone
despairing loudly from in front of one of the
dance game machines.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Why not? The reason is clearly written.
"Operation of this game has been suspended due
to a lack of players. Replacement by a newer
machine scheduled soon."

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Grrr! But I wanted to show you how cool I look
when I play!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Whyever would you want to do that...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Regardless, there's nothing we can do about this.
Why don't we play a different game?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: No way! I'm gonna go talk to the manager!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
All right. I worked things out so I'm allowed to
play this game as long as I can find a way to
boost its popularity!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I'll need you to handle the live stream, McQueen!
I'm sure everyone will want in on the fun once
they see me dancing!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
W-wait just a moment! How were you able to
"work things out" at all?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Well, the manager said they shut this game
down because of a lack of interest, so if we can
attract people's attention, then problem solved!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
So you essentially forced a deal to suit your own
selfish desire?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
What's wrong with being a little selfish? It's better
than doing nothing. Besides, this is to the
arcade's benefit too.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I want everyone to realize how fun this game is!
Let's get hyped and really show off what it's
about!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: So she's not just doing this for her own gain...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Very well. I shall assist you. ...So what exactly do I
need to do for this live stream?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hup! Hah!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Are you getting this, McQueen? How do I look?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I'm recording you, and you're doing fine...
Goodness! We already have 5,000 viewers?! The
comments are pouring in, too!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Hey there, everyone! Today, I'm showing
off my favorite dance game. So stick around, and
I'll show you some sweet moves!

text_block_list.name: Crowd
text_block_list.text: Clap, clap, clap!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hm?! Where did this crowd come from?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for watching me strut my stuff! I hope
you'll give this game a try for yourselves!

text_block_list.name: High School Girl A
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I wanna play too! Teio looked like she was
having so much fun!

text_block_list.name: High School Girl B
text_block_list.text: Count me in next!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ehehe. Looks like my plan was a great success. ♪

text_block_list.name: Arcade Manager
text_block_list.text:
Thanks so much, you two! I can't believe you
really pulled it off!

text_block_list.name: Arcade Manager
text_block_list.text:
I've decided to keep this machine in operation!
Thanks for choosing to play here even though you
could've played this game at another arcade!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Wait... Does that mean we could simply have
gone elsewhere?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Then it wasn't at all necessary to negotiate with
the manager, let alone stream everything...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Of course it was necessary! I mean, I wanted to
play this game, right here, right now!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe you created such a commotion on
a mere whim... I suppose there's a good reason
they call you the Monarch...
